---
title: ""
---

::: {.personal-page}

<h2 class="conference-heading">
  Conferences Attended <span class="amp">&</span> Presentations
</h2>

::: {.conference-list}

::: {.conference-item}
**Oct 2025** — *The Ripple Effect: Nepal's 2015 Earthquake and Age at First Birth* — Missouri Valley Economic Association, 62nd Annual Meeting, Kansas City, MO
[<a href="https://www.mvea.net/program.html" target="_blank" rel="noopener">program</a>] 
:::

::: {.conference-item}
**Mar 2025** — *Shaken to the Core: The Effect of Nepal’s 2015 Earthquake on Infant Death* — 89th 
Annual Meetings of the Midwest Economics Association, Kansas City, 
MO [<a href="https://mea.sites.grinnell.edu/annual-meetings/previous-conferences/" target="_blank" rel="noopener">program</a>]
:::

::: {.conference-item}
**Oct 2024** — *Heterogeneous Impact of Earthquake on Infant Mortality* — Missouri Valley Economic 
Association, 61st Annual Meeting, Kansas City, 
MO [<a href="https://www.mvea.net/" target="_blank" rel="noopener">program</a>]
:::

:::

:::
